criteria_verification.criterion_text: Both wrappers in `src/forge/tools/graphiti.py`, each decorated with
criteria_verification.evidence: src/forge/tools/graphiti.py exports guardkit_graphiti_add_context and guardkit_graphiti_query, each defined under @tool(parse_docstring=True). Verified at runtime: both are LangChain BaseTool instances; args_schema.model_fields contains doc_path/group/repo and query/group/repo respectively; the parsed description starts with 'Run `guardkit graphiti …`'. TestDecoratorSurface.* (4/4) passes.
criteria_verification.notes: src/forge/tools/graphiti.py exports guardkit_graphiti_add_context and guardkit_graphiti_query, each defined under @tool(parse_docstring=True). Verified at runtime: both are LangChain BaseTool instances; args_schema.model_fields contains doc_path/group/repo and query/group/repo respectively; the parsed description starts with 'Run `guardkit graphiti …`'. TestDecoratorSurface.* (4/4) passes.

criteria_verification.evidence: _invoke_graphiti() forwards literal subcommand='graphiti add-context' / 'graphiti query' into guardkit_run. Captured kwargs in TestSubcommandPrefixBypassesResolver.* assert subcommand exact-match AND .startswith('graphiti '), which satisfies run()'s _is_graphiti_subcommand head-token detector (TASK-GCI-008) and triggers the resolver-skip branch.
criteria_verification.notes: _invoke_graphiti() forwards literal subcommand='graphiti add-context' / 'graphiti query' into guardkit_run. Captured kwargs in TestSubcommandPrefixBypassesResolver.* assert subcommand exact-match AND .startswith('graphiti '), which satisfies run()'s _is_graphiti_subcommand head-token detector (TASK-GCI-008) and triggers the resolver-skip branch.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: No `--context` flags appear in the assembled command line for either
criteria_verification.evidence: _invoke_graphiti() deliberately does NOT accept or thread an extra_context_paths kwarg through to guardkit_run() (contrast with the GCI-009 helper which does). TestNoContextFlagInArgv.* (4 tests) assert '--context' not in kwargs['args'] AND kwargs.get('extra_context_paths') in (None, []) for both tools. Combined with AC-002 (resolver skipped at run() level), no --context token can appear in the final argv.
criteria_verification.notes: _invoke_graphiti() deliberately does NOT accept or thread an extra_context_paths kwarg through to guardkit_run() (contrast with the GCI-009 helper which does). TestNoContextFlagInArgv.* (4 tests) assert '--context' not in kwargs['args'] AND kwargs.get('extra_context_paths') in (None, []) for both tools. Combined with AC-002 (resolver skipped at run() level), no --context token can appear in the final argv.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Both return a JSON string; on internal exception, return
criteria_verification.evidence: Success/failed/timeout paths return result.model_dump_json() (canonical GuardKitResult). Exception path uses _error_json() with json.dumps to build {'status':'error','error':'<ExcType>: <msg>','tool':'<name>'} — safe under quote/backslash payloads. TestReturnIsJsonString.* (3) and TestInternalExceptionsAreAbsorbed.* (3) verify all four code paths.
criteria_verification.notes: Success/failed/timeout paths return result.model_dump_json() (canonical GuardKitResult). Exception path uses _error_json() with json.dumps to build {'status':'error','error':'<ExcType>: <msg>','tool':'<name>'} — safe under quote/backslash payloads. TestReturnIsJsonString.* (3) and TestInternalExceptionsAreAbsorbed.* (3) verify all four code paths.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Function body wrapped in `try/except Exception as exc:`
criteria_verification.evidence: Each @tool body is wrapped in try/except Exception as exc: returning _error_json(exc, tool_name). _invoke_graphiti() has its own try/except as defence-in-depth. TestInternalExceptionsAreAbsorbed.test_*_returns_error_json_when_run_raises confirms exceptions never propagate.
criteria_verification.notes: Each @tool body is wrapped in try/except Exception as exc: returning _error_json(exc, tool_name). _invoke_graphiti() has its own try/except as defence-in-depth. TestInternalExceptionsAreAbsorbed.test_*_returns_error_json_when_run_raises confirms exceptions never propagate.

criteria_verification.evidence: Module-level logger built via _build_logger() prefers structlog.get_logger('forge.tools.graphiti') and falls back to a kwargs-accepting _StdlibStructLogger shim if structlog is unavailable. Success path calls logger.info('guardkit_graphiti_tool_invocation', tool_name=..., duration_ms=..., status=result.status); error path calls logger.exception(..., status='error'). TestStructuredLogging.* (2 tests) assert the contractual triple is captured on logger.info kwargs.
criteria_verification.notes: Module-level logger built via _build_logger() prefers structlog.get_logger('forge.tools.graphiti') and falls back to a kwargs-accepting _StdlibStructLogger shim if structlog is unavailable. Success path calls logger.info('guardkit_graphiti_tool_invocation', tool_name=..., duration_ms=..., status=result.status); error path calls logger.exception(..., status='error'). TestStructuredLogging.* (2 tests) assert the contractual triple is captured on logger.info kwargs.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests: each wrapper returns the right JSON shape on
criteria_verification.evidence: tests/forge/tools/test_graphiti.py organises 21 tests by AC. Coverage: success/failed/timeout JSON shape (TestReturnIsJsonString), exception → ADR-ARCH-025 envelope (TestInternalExceptionsAreAbsorbed), no --context in kwargs (TestNoContextFlagInArgv), 'graphiti ' subcommand prefix (TestSubcommandPrefixBypassesResolver), parse_docstring schema (TestDecoratorSurface), kwargs structured-logging contract (TestStructuredLogging), AST-based resolver-import guard (TestModuleHygiene), and absolute-allowlist-eligible cwd (TestRepoConfinement). All 21 pass; the wider tests/forge/adapters/guardkit/ + tests/forge/tools/ regression set (242 tests) also passes.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero
criteria_verification.evidence: Turn 2 fix: ran black --line-length 88 --target-version py312 (.claude/rules/code-style.md mandates 'Use Black formatter, Max line length: 88') against both new files and accepted the reformat (a few line-collapse changes in test_graphiti.py — no semantic change). Then ran ruff check, which flagged one F401 'unittest.mock imported but unused' in test_graphiti.py — fixed via ruff check --fix (the import was a leftover from an earlier draft). Final state: `black --check --line-length 88 --target-version py312 src/forge/tools/graphiti.py tests/forge/tools/test_graphiti.py` reports 'All done! ✨ 🍰 ✨ 2 files would be left unchanged.' and `ruff check src/forge/tools/graphiti.py tests/forge/tools/test_graphiti.py` reports 'All checks passed!'. All 21 tests still pass after the lint fixes (and the wider 242-test regression set is unchanged).
